description: Turn text/HTML into guaranteed schema-valid JSON, or pay nothing (x402, USDC on Base).
name: io.github.noamjose/schemasure

environmentVariables.description: Extraction backend: mock (offline default), google, or openai.
environmentVariables.name: LLM_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Google Generative AI API key (required only when LLM_PROVIDER=google).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (required only when LLM_PROVIDER=openai).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the default extraction model id for the selected provider.
environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_MODEL

title: SchemaSure — structured extraction
